name: Reactive State Management
description: Singleton StateManager with pub/sub pattern drives UI re-renders on every state mutation — demonstrated in latest_commit/ and details/.

name: Async/Await & Promise Chaining
description: Non-blocking data fetching with abort controllers, timeout handling, and concurrent Promise.all() orchestration throughout yfinance, showcase, and best/performers/engine.

name: IndexedDB Caching Layer
description: TTL-aware IndexedDB wrappers (CacheService) used in latest_commit/, best/performers/engine/cache.js, and showcase/ to serve stale-while-revalidate and offline-first data.

name: CSS Animation & Generator Functions
description: Staggered entrance animations driven by generator functions and requestAnimationFrame — see latest_commit/js/UIManager.js and details/js/ui/UIRenderer.js.

name: ES Module Architecture
description: The router, MVC framework, and showcase each use ES module imports/exports, enabling clean dependency graphs without bundlers.

name: GPU Dispatch & Kernel Registry
description: gpu/ provides auto-backend selection (CUDA → MPS → TensorFlow → CPU), a thread-pool dispatcher with @register decorator, and registered kernels for HOSVD, Kalman, Monte Carlo, and PCA.

name: ML / Tensor Decomposition
description: tensor/financial implements Tucker decomposition, Haar wavelet, Kalman smoothing, 5-regime softmax classification, and VaR computation over LOOKBACK=30 feature windows.

name: Client-Side MVC Router
description: mvc/mvc-router.js provides History-API/hash routing, nested routes, named params, navigation guards, before/after hooks, and sessionStorage caching of the routes manifest.

name: Private Class Fields & OOP Patterns
description: Modern JavaScript private fields (#field syntax) used throughout UIManager, CacheService, Router, and AnimationController to enforce encapsulation without closures.
